title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 8 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 8 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 8 2026
summary:
Main
On May 8, 2026, iron ore futures experienced oscillating movements in the morning session before edging lower in the afternoon.The main contract I2609 closed at 814.5 yuan/ton, down 0.06% from the previous trading session. Port spot prices remained largely flat compared to the day before. Traders showed limited enthusiasm for quoting, while most steel mills adopted a wait-and-see approach, with purchases driven mainly by immediate needs.
